title: SignalRConnectorOptions
description: Constructor options for SignalRConnector. Requires @microsoft/signalr as a peer dependency. Source: packages/connector-signalr/src/SignalRConnector.ts.

hubName.description: Logical hub name — informational, not sent on the wire.

receiveMethod.description: Hub method name the server invokes when delivering a message or a rich frame (tool_call, genui, typing, HITL chips).

genUIEventMethod.description: Hub method invoked to send a GenUI component event back to the server, with the genui_event frame.

accessTokenFactory.description: Function returning a bearer token (or Promise of one). Cannot be serialised — set programmatically.
